title: A display device for vehicles and method thereof
abstract: The present invention provides a display device for vehicles. The device comprising a display sheet having a plurality of display regions, a first end region, and a second end region, a housing having an interior space and a first rotator, the first rotator being configured to rotate the first end region of the first shaft, and the first end region of the display sheet being detachably attached to the first shaft in such a way that when the first shaft rotates, the display sheet either rolls onto the first shaft or unrolls outward the first shaft, a second shaft comprising a first and a second end region rotatably mounted to the housing, a motor fixed inside the housing and directly or indirectly mechanically connected to the first rotator, a controller comprising a memory and a processor, the memory being operatively connected to the processor and storing computer-executable instructions. Further, a method of displaying a display region of a display sheet is provided.
